Class Post

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.Post
public class Post extends Object

Title: Post Class

Description: Represents a single discussion post in the Student Discussion System, similar to a post on Ed Discussion. Handles all CRUD operations and input validation for posts made by students. Located in entityClasses alongside the User class.

Posts can be QUESTION or STATEMENT type. A post can also be a reply to another post using parentPostId — this way we don't need a separate Reply class or table. If parentPostId is -1 it's a top-level thread, otherwise it's a reply.

Posts belong to a thread (defaults to "General"). Thread creation/deletion is a staff function (TP3), so students just post to existing threads.

Soft delete: when a student deletes a post, isDeleted is set to TRUE rather than removing the record. Replies are preserved and show a deletion notice per the spec.

isInstructorEndorsed and staffComment are included for TP3 Staff Epics so we don't need a schema change later.

Testing: The CRUD and validation methods in this class are directly validated by the automated tests in TestStudentPosts.

Version:
1.00 2026-03-21 Initial TP2 implementation, 1.01 2026-03-21 Added thread, isDeleted; fixed postType to QUESTION/STATEMENT
Author:
Prince Dahiya, Sumukh Gowda, Klim Savalia, Micah Branton, Huu Binh Vu

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private String
    authorUsername
    Username of whoever created this post.
    private String
    body
    Full text content of the post.
    static final String
    DEFAULT_THREAD
    Default thread name — all posts go here until staff creates more threads in TP3.
    private int
    id
    Database primary key.
    private boolean
    isDeleted
    Soft delete flag.
    private boolean
    isInstructorEndorsed
    Whether an instructor has endorsed this post.
    private boolean
    isResolved
    Whether this question has been answered/resolved.
    static final int
    MAX_BODY_LEN
    Max characters for a post body.
    static final int
    MAX_STAFF_COMMENT_LEN
    Max characters for a staff comment (anticipated for TP3).
    static final int
    MAX_TITLE_LEN
    Max characters for a post title.
    static final int
    NO_PARENT
    Sentinel value meaning this post has no parent (it's a top-level thread).
    private int
    parentPostId
    ID of the parent post if this is a reply, or NO_PARENT (-1) if top-level.
    private String
    postType
    Type of post: "QUESTION" or "STATEMENT".
    private String
    staffComment
    Optional feedback from a staff member.
    private String
    thread
    The discussion thread this post belongs to.
    private String
    timestamp
    Timestamp of when the post was created, formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".
    private String
    title
    Short title of the post.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_TITLE_LEN

      public static final int MAX_TITLE_LEN
      Max characters for a post title.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAX_BODY_LEN

      public static final int MAX_BODY_LEN
      Max characters for a post body.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAX_STAFF_COMMENT_LEN

      public static final int MAX_STAFF_COMMENT_LEN
      Max characters for a staff comment (anticipated for TP3).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • NO_PARENT

      public static final int NO_PARENT
      Sentinel value meaning this post has no parent (it's a top-level thread).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_THREAD

      public static final String DEFAULT_THREAD
      Default thread name — all posts go here until staff creates more threads in TP3.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • id

      private int id
      Database primary key. Set to 0 before insert; DB assigns the real ID.

    • title

      private String title
      Short title of the post. Required.

    • body

      private String body
      Full text content of the post. Required.

    • authorUsername

      private String authorUsername
      Username of whoever created this post. Used to enforce ownership so only the author can edit/delete. Also needed for TP3 Staff Epics to track participation.

    • timestamp

      private String timestamp
      Timestamp of when the post was created, formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss".

    • postType

      private String postType
      Type of post: "QUESTION" or "STATEMENT". Students post questions and statements per the user stories. Stored as String instead of enum to keep H2 compatibility simple.

    • thread

      private String thread
      The discussion thread this post belongs to. Defaults to "General". Thread creation is a staff function (TP3) — students just post to existing threads.

    • parentPostId

      private int parentPostId
      ID of the parent post if this is a reply, or NO_PARENT (-1) if top-level. This design lets us store both posts and replies in one table.

    • isResolved

      private boolean isResolved
      Whether this question has been answered/resolved. Only matters for QUESTION type.

    • isDeleted

      private boolean isDeleted
      Soft delete flag. When TRUE, the post content is replaced with a deletion notice but the record stays in the DB so replies remain visible per the spec.

    • isInstructorEndorsed

      private boolean isInstructorEndorsed
      Whether an instructor has endorsed this post. Not used in TP2 UI yet, included so we don't need a schema change in TP3.

    • staffComment

      private String staffComment
      Optional feedback from a staff member. Not used in TP2 UI yet, included for TP3. Always stored as empty string rather than null to avoid null checks in the View.

  • Constructor Details

    • Post

      public Post(String title, String body, String authorUsername, String postType, int parentPostId)

      Method: Post(String, String, String, String, int)

      Description: Main constructor for creating a new post from the GUI. Thread defaults to "General". Timestamp is set automatically.

      Parameters:
      title - Post title
      body - Post body text
      authorUsername - Username of the student creating this post
      postType - "QUESTION" or "STATEMENT"
      parentPostId - NO_PARENT (-1) for new thread, or a post ID if this is a reply

    • Post

      public Post(String title, String body, String authorUsername, String postType, int parentPostId, String thread)

      Method: Post(String, String, String, String, int, String)

      Description: Constructor that also specifies a thread. Used when posting to a non-default thread.

      Parameters:
      title - Post title
      body - Post body text
      authorUsername - Username of the student creating this post
      postType - "QUESTION" or "STATEMENT"
      parentPostId - NO_PARENT or a valid post ID for replies
      thread - The thread to post to (e.g. "General")

    • Post

      public Post(int id, String title, String body, String authorUsername, String timestamp, String postType, String thread, int parentPostId, boolean isResolved, boolean isDeleted, boolean isInstructorEndorsed, String staffComment)

      Method: Post(int, String, ...) — full DB constructor

      Description: Full constructor used by the Database layer when loading existing posts from a ResultSet. Every field is provided explicitly.

      Parameters:
      id - DB primary key
      title - Post title
      body - Post body
      authorUsername - Author's username
      timestamp - Creation timestamp string
      postType - "QUESTION" or "STATEMENT"
      thread - Thread name
      parentPostId - Parent ID or NO_PARENT
      isResolved - Whether marked resolved
      isDeleted - Whether soft-deleted
      isInstructorEndorsed - Whether endorsed by staff (TP3)
      staffComment - Staff feedback if any (TP3)

  • Method Details

    • validateTitle

      public static String validateTitle(String title)

      Method: validateTitle(String)

      Description: Checks title isn't empty and isn't over the limit.

      Parameters:
      title - The title to validate
      Returns:
      Empty string if valid, error message otherwise

    • validateBody

      public static String validateBody(String body)

      Method: validateBody(String)

      Description: Checks body isn't empty and isn't over the limit.

      Parameters:
      body - The body text to validate
      Returns:
      Empty string if valid, error message otherwise

    • validatePostType

      public static String validatePostType(String postType)

      Method: validatePostType(String)

      Description: Makes sure the post type is QUESTION or STATEMENT.

      Parameters:
      postType - The post type string to validate
      Returns:
      Empty string if valid, error message otherwise

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns:
      The database ID of this post

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      Returns:
      The post title (or "[Deleted]" label handled by display logic)

    • getBody

      public String getBody()
      Returns:
      The full post body text

    • getAuthorUsername

      public String getAuthorUsername()
      Returns:
      The username of the student who created this post

    • getTimestamp

      public String getTimestamp()
      Returns:
      The creation timestamp string

    • getPostType

      public String getPostType()
      Returns:
      The post type ("QUESTION" or "STATEMENT")

    • getThread

      public String getThread()
      Returns:
      The thread this post belongs to

    • getParentPostId

      public int getParentPostId()
      Returns:
      The parent post ID, or NO_PARENT (-1) if top-level

    • isResolved

      public boolean isResolved()
      Returns:
      True if this question has been marked as resolved

    • isDeleted

      public boolean isDeleted()
      Returns:
      True if the author has soft-deleted this post

    • isInstructorEndorsed

      public boolean isInstructorEndorsed()
      Returns:
      True if an instructor has endorsed this post (TP3)

    • getStaffComment

      public String getStaffComment()
      Returns:
      Any staff comment, or empty string if none (TP3)

    • setTitle

      public void setTitle(String title)
      Parameters:
      title - New title (validate with validateTitle first)

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)
      Parameters:
      body - New body text (validate with validateBody first)

    • setResolved

      public void setResolved(boolean resolved)
      Parameters:
      resolved - True to mark resolved, false to reopen

    • setDeleted

      public void setDeleted(boolean deleted)
      Parameters:
      deleted - True marks this post as soft-deleted

    • setThread

      public void setThread(String thread)
      Parameters:
      thread - The thread name for this post

    • setInstructorEndorsed

      public void setInstructorEndorsed(boolean endorsed)
      Parameters:
      endorsed - True if an instructor endorsed this. For TP3.

    • setStaffComment

      public void setStaffComment(String staffComment)
      Parameters:
      staffComment - Staff feedback. Stores "" instead of null. For TP3.

    • isReply

      public boolean isReply()

      Method: isReply()

      Description: Returns true if this post is a reply to another post. Used by the View to decide whether to indent it under its parent.

      Returns:
      True if this is a reply, false if it's a top-level thread

    • toString

      public String toString()

      Method: toString()

      Description: Human-readable summary for debugging and test output.

      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      Formatted string with the key fields of this post
